# Packrift Exact-Spec Size Directory

A public Packrift exact-spec directory built from staged exact-spec child-page candidates and approved in-stock catalog evidence, with one crawlable record per page-grade SKU/spec candidate.

Canonical URL: https://packrift.github.io/exact-spec-size-directory/
Sitemap: https://packrift.github.io/exact-spec-size-directory/sitemap.xml
JSON dataset: https://packrift.github.io/exact-spec-size-directory/data/exact-spec-size-directory.json
CSV dataset: https://packrift.github.io/exact-spec-size-directory/data/exact-spec-size-directory.csv
Methodology: https://packrift.github.io/exact-spec-size-directory/methodology/

Boundary: staged exact-spec candidate handles are included for traceability but are not claimed live on packrift.com. Related SKUs are buyer-review aids, not fit guarantees or substitute approvals. No supplier cost, Packrift margin, customer/order/cart/payment data, private freight data, secrets, paid links, or outreach dependency.
